commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a doctor-owned migration for legacy `agent_databases` primary keys, makes runtime reject the legacy shared SQLite schema with a repair hint, defers plugin doctor migrations until after the shared schema repair, and adds focused regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +190, Tests +163. Total +353 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main upserts into `agent_databases` with `ON CONFLICT(agent_id, path)`, and the legacy `PRIMARY KEY(agent_id)` shape fails that SQLite contract. I did not run a full OpenClaw doctor/startup repro in this read-only review.

target.title: fix: migrate legacy agent registry schema via doctor
target.body:
## Summary
- move the legacy `agent_databases` primary-key repair into `openclaw doctor --fix`
- keep steady-state runtime strict: legacy shared state DBs now fail with a doctor repair hint
- defer plugin doctor migrations until after the shared schema repair so old DBs do not trip plugin-owned writes

## Release note context
Fixes upgrades from legacy shared SQLite state where the agent database registry was keyed only by `agent_id`, causing runtime upserts on `(agent_id, path)` to fail with SQLite `ON CONFLICT` errors. `openclaw doctor --fix` now migrates that shipped DB shape to the current composite key.

## Verification
- `pnpm test src/state/openclaw-agent-db.test.ts src/commands/doctor-state-migrations.test.ts src/commands/doctor.runs-legacy-state-migrations-yes-mode-without.e2e.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `git diff --check`
- `/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-skills/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings
